text: No operator of any offstreet parking facility shall park the vehicle of a patron of the facility in any street or alley.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 11. Parking Lots [22950 - 22953]
##### § 22951

No operator of any offstreet parking facility shall park the vehicle of a patron of the facility in any street or alley.

*(Added by renumbering Section 22518 by Stats. 1965, Ch. 1041.)*

subsections.text: No operator of any offstreet parking facility shall park the vehicle of a patron of the facility in any street or alley.

history.raw: (Added by renumbering Section 22518 by Stats. 1965, Ch. 1041.)
